movieData.title: Wednesday
movieData.description: Wednesday Addams returns to Nevermore Academy for another dark adventure filled with mysterious secrets, supernatural threats, and unexpected challenges. As she investigates new mysteries, Wednesday explores her psychic visions, strange friendships, and dangerous enemies while uncovering hidden truths.

movieData.title: Stranger Things Season 5
movieData.description: The final battle begins as Eleven and her friends unite against Vecna. Hawkins faces its greatest danger ever while friendships, sacrifice, courage, and hope determine the fate of their town and the entire world forever.

movieData.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day
movieData.description: Peter Parker embraces a completely new beginning after the multiverse events. He faces powerful enemies, protects New York alone, discovers unexpected allies, and learns that every heroic choice carries responsibility and lasting consequences.

movieData.title: Avatar: Fire and Ash
movieData.description: Jake Sully leads his family through dangerous new regions of Pandora where powerful tribes emerge. Ancient conflicts, breathtaking landscapes, emotional sacrifices, and survival shape the next unforgettable chapter of the Avatar saga.

movieData.title: The Batman Part II
movieData.description: Batman returns to Gotham City where a mysterious new criminal threatens the city's future. Dark investigations, emotional struggles, dangerous alliances, and intense action challenge Bruce Wayne like never before throughout his journey.

movieData.title: Harry Potter
movieData.description: Harry Potter returns to the Wizarding World as a new magical threat rises. Alongside familiar faces and powerful new allies, he uncovers ancient secrets, faces dangerous enemies, and fights to protect Hogwarts and the future of the magical world.

movieData.title: Dune Messiah
movieData.description: Paul Atreides struggles with the enormous responsibilities of ruling the galaxy while powerful political conspiracies, betrayal, destiny, and personal sacrifice reshape the future of Arrakis and everyone connected to his empire.

movieData.title: Pirates of the Caribbean
movieData.description: Captain Jack Sparrow begins an unforgettable adventure across dangerous seas filled with pirates, treasure, and supernatural mysteries. With clever tricks and unexpected friendships, he battles enemies while searching for freedom and legendary riches.

movieData.title: Jurassic World Rebirth
movieData.description: A new expedition enters a dangerous world filled with genetically evolved dinosaurs. As survival becomes impossible, a team of explorers must uncover hidden secrets and escape from the most terrifying creatures on Earth.

movieData.title: Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man
movieData.description: Tommy Shelby returns in a dark and intense crime drama set during a dangerous new era. Facing enemies, political conflicts, and personal demons, Tommy must protect his legacy while navigating power, loyalty, and betrayal.
